description: Resolving AccessDenied by attaching a wildcard IAM policy instead of the missing scoped statement.
body: Failure mode: an engineer hits AccessDenied and attaches Action:* / Resource:* (or AdministratorAccess) to make it pass, silently over-privileging the principal. Detection signals: CloudTrail shows the call now succeeds but iam simulate-principal-policy allows far more than the task needs; IAM Access Analyzer flags unused or overly broad permissions. Do not use a wildcard grant or a broad managed policy as a fix. Safer fallback: add only the specific Action and Resource the CloudTrail event named, gate behind a condition key, and escalate to a human if a wildcard truly seems required.
